nodes.label: AI as practice student for teaching explanations
nodes.label_negative: AI as passive yes-man without challenge
nodes.grounding_span: I have it pretend that it is a student who is at the given grade level and proficiency in the topic

nodes.label: AI setup time vs. manual task completion
nodes.label_negative: AI setup time outweighing efficiency gains
nodes.grounding_span: it takes a good amount of time to setup these kinds of conversations and ensure the AI is doing everything properly

nodes.label: AI reliability with complex instructions
nodes.label_negative: AI forgetting parts of long instructions
nodes.grounding_span: it forgets to do a portion of the instructions. this happens more often the longer and more complex the instructions are

nodes.label: Workplace normalization of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: my boss saying that I can use AI to help make problem sets made me feel more comfortable

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner vs. independent delegator
nodes.grounding_span: i am much more likely to collaborate with it throughout the task

nodes.label: Teaching effectiveness and student understanding
nodes.grounding_span: practice how I would verbalize the topic once I feel as if the model knows what is going on

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: if I think that it will end up taking more time to explain everything to the AI before I get my help compared to just doing it myself I will do it my own faster

nodes.label: Job security and professional relevance
nodes.grounding_span: the mix of there being low skill and trust for certain tasks to be completed by AI will keep my role a necessary one

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as practice tool after trial and error
nodes.grounding_span: the AI model does a good job asking questions about common areas of confusion

nodes.label: Frustration with AI forgetting instructions
nodes.grounding_span: it forgets to do a portion of the instructions

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration in tutoring
nodes.grounding_span: there will be new inventive ways to use AI at my workspace in the future

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing tutoring role
Iterative trial-and-error refinement of AI prompts
nodes.grounding_span: I have gone through a good amount of trial and error with training/prepping the model

nodes.label: Efficiency-driven cost-benefit analysis of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: if I think that it will end up taking more time to explain everything to the AI before I get my help compared to just doing it myself I will do it my own faster
